joke: Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
Why don't eggs tell jokes? They'd crack each other up!
Why did the bicycle fall over? It was two-tired!
Why did the scarecrow win an award? He was outstanding in his field!
Why did the coffee file a police report? It got mugged!
Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole in one!
Why don't skeletons fight each other? They don't have the guts!
Why did the man throw his clock out the window? He wanted to see time fly!
Why did the picture go to jail? Because it was framed!
Why was the belt arrested? It held up a pair of pants!
Why was the computer cold? It left its Windows open!
Why couldn't the pirate learn the alphabet? Because he kept getting lost at C!
Why do bees hum? Because they don't know the words!
Why did the tomato turn red? Because it saw the salad dressing!
Why did the man run around his bed? He wanted to catch up on his sleep!
Why did the student bring a ladder to school? He wanted to go to high school!
Why did the man put his money in the freezer? He wanted cold hard cash!
Why do birds fly south for the winter? Because it's too far to walk!
Why was six afraid of seven? Because seven eight nine!
Why did the tree go to the dentist? Because it needed a root canal!
Why are frogs so happy? They eat whatever bugs them!
Why don't people trust stairs? Because they're always up to something!
Why did the elevator go to the doctor? Because it was feeling a little down!
Why do cemeteries have fences around them? Because people are dying to get in!
Why did the invisible man turn down the job offer? He couldn't see himself doing it!
Why is the ocean so friendly? Because it waves!
Why was the broom late? It overswept!
Why was the piano locked out of its house? Because it lost its keys!
Why don't you write with a broken pencil? Because it's pointless!
Why did the man fall into the well? He couldn't see that well!
